description: Petition from Shelomo b. Yehuda to the caliph al-Ẓāhir (matn only) defending his position against Yūsuf al-Sijilmasi, the Iraqi leader in Palestine. Dating: original document ca. 1030, but this copy may be several decades later. Discussed in Khan, JRAS, p53; Rustow, Heresy and elsewhere; Rustow, Lost Archive, p. 347. According to Gil, in the hand of Avraham Ha-Kohen b. Isḥaq b. Furat; according to Rustow, in the same hand as ENA NS 13.15 (PGPID 36027) and T-S K25.244 (PGPID 1344).
tags: Petition, State, DIMME, lost archive, investiture, copy
description_he: עצומה משלמה בן יהודה לח'ליף אל-ת'אהר בגנות יוסף אל-סיג'ילמסי המנהיג העיראקי בארץ ישראל, בערך 1030.
